quick_index.title: Quick Index
quick_index.content:
- Overview

memory_mode.title: Memory Mode
memory_mode.body:
## Memory Mode

Which memory artifacts below are active depends on `workflow.memory_mode`. Full contract: `project/code/MEMORY-MODE.json`.

- `project_scoped`: the agent owns and evolves the project, so durable knowledge has a project-level home. The decision log, context capsules, and backlog are active, and branch/unit work PROMOTES durable findings and decisions up into them at the end.
- `task_scoped`: work is ticket-driven and deploy-and-forget on a codebase the agent does not own. There is no project-owned durable home, so durable knowledge (decisions, rationale, constraints, READ-FIRST gotchas) folds into the unit active state and is archived with the unit. The decision log and context capsules are NOT used; there is no promotion.

Default comes from the active work profile and may be overridden per project. Memory mode is orthogonal to `branch_mode`, which only decides where active working memory physically lives.

active_state.title: Active State
active_state.body:
## Active State

`DOCS.json` is the document routing map and should be read before reading, creating, renaming, or updating project documents.

The active state is the first memory file an agent reads after `DOCS.json`.

It should stay short:

- current objective,
- current pass,
- next action,
- blockers,
- risks,
- non-regression reminders.

Under `task_scoped` mode the active state is also the durable home: it additionally holds decisions and their rationale, constraints, and READ-FIRST gotchas that would otherwise live in the decision log or context capsules, because those are inactive in that mode.

branch_scoped_active_state.title: Branch-Scoped Active State
branch_scoped_active_state.body:
## Branch-Scoped Active State

Branch-scoped active state is local working memory for one Git branch.

Use it when the project config sets `workflow.branch_mode` to `branch_scoped`.

It normally lives under `ignored/ai-socratex/<branch>-STATE.md`.

It may use the user's prompt language because it is local-only working memory.

It stores branch facts:

- findings,
- root causes,
- changes made,
- verification,
- current blockers,
- durable findings that may need promotion.

It should not replace durable project memory.

plan.title: Plan
plan.body:
## Plan

The plan contains only active and future execution passes.

It is not history.

In branch-scoped mode, the branch plan lives under `ignored/ai-socratex/<branch>-PLAN.md`.

It contains next steps only and should be updated continuously during the branch.

backlog.title: Backlog
backlog.body:
## Backlog

The backlog contains valuable work that is not yet committed to the active execution sequence.

Active under `project_scoped` mode. Under `task_scoped`, uncommitted work stays in the unit plan or the shared cross-ticket backlog, not a project backlog.

decisions.title: Decisions
decisions.body:
## Decisions

Active under `project_scoped` mode only. Under `task_scoped`, decisions fold into the unit active state instead (see Memory Mode).

The decision log records durable choices that future agents should not silently reverse.

Record:

- decision,
- context,
- rationale,
- consequences,
- verification or revisit condition.

context_capsules.title: Context Capsules
context_capsules.body:
## Context Capsules

Active under `project_scoped` mode only. Under `task_scoped`, invariants, known traps, and source-of-truth paths fold into the unit active state instead (see Memory Mode).

Context capsules store compact, current-state knowledge.

Use them for:

- invariants,
- ownership contracts,
- known traps,
- source-of-truth paths,
- performance or process heuristics.

Do not use them for:

- history,
- scratch notes,
- duplicated backlog,
- speculative future roadmaps.
